title: gagea stenopetala subsp. pratensis
intro: Gagea stenopetala subsp. pratensis, also known as the Himalayan gagea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the lily family (Liliaceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Gagea stenopetala subsp. pratensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
